name: Glossier
philosophy: Matured millennial-pink editorial — pink is now a surface band, not a button. Magazine-weight serif display, true-black CTAs, navigation set in all-caps tight tracking.

design_language.motion_signature: 220ms ease-out hover; signature slow color-tone wash on button hover; 600ms ease-in-out horizontal carousel glides.

trademark_signals: Pink as surface band, never as button — the maturity move
Serif display in beauty (an industry of geometric sans)
True-black CTAs on white — refuses the brand-tone-button trap
Product names set in serif at large size, treated as editorial headlines
ai_slop_avoided: Don't render pink buttons — pink is surface only
Don't add countdown timers or scarcity chrome
Don't use influencer-style photography — real customers on UGC
